title: Front Office Manager - dnata India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - dnata India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at dnata India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About dnata India:
dnata India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India!
